Frontier-orbital gap — B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit DFT (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.  Geometry: fixed input coordinates (user-supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz, 9 atoms); single-point only (no re-optimization).  SCF converged in 9 cycles.

Results (eV):
• HOMO = −6.3597638
• LUMO = −0.1024036
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV

No warnings were reported by the engine (warnings []).
Calculation invoked via chemkit skill `frontier-orbitals` with `--method dft --tier standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP); live output streamed to the default frontier-orbital .out file in the working directory.  Integrity check: status ok, trustworthy true.
